summary.summary: Imported via zip fallback, file count: 931

core_modules.description: Central plugin lifecycle and discovery surface; best anchor for MCP integration with minimal intrusion.
Bridges plugin-provided Builder/Coder experiment components into experiment compilation/runtime.
Hardware abstraction and routing layer; useful if MCP tools need controlled access to device inventory/actions.
GUI-facing plugin management logic; useful as reference but less suitable than core runtime plugin API for MCP.
High-level orchestration context for experiment runtime, candidate MCP boundary for non-GUI execution workflows.

cli_commands.name: python -m psychopy.app
cli_commands.description: Launches PsychoPy desktop app entry path.

cli_commands.name: psyexpCompile
cli_commands.description: Compiles Builder .psyexp experiments to runnable scripts; good non-GUI command integration point.

cli_commands.name: psychopy-pkgutil
cli_commands.description: Package utility helper script for environment/package operations.
